-################################################################################
-
-include LibCommon.gmk
-
-################################################################################
-## Build libjaas
-################################################################################
-
-ifeq ($(call isTargetOs, windows), true)
-  $(eval $(call SetupJdkLibrary, BUILD_LIBJAAS, \
-      NAME := jaas, \
-      OPTIMIZATION := LOW, \
-      EXTRA_HEADER_DIRS := java.base:libjava, \
-      LIBS_windows := advapi32.lib mpr.lib netapi32.lib user32.lib, \
-  ))
-
-  TARGETS += $(BUILD_LIBJAAS)
-endif
-################################################################################

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+The classes in this package is generated with
+```
+jextract @atfile
+```
+
+After the generation, modify each class:
+- Add `@SuppressWarnings("restricted")`
+- Add Copyright information
+- Remove the extra newline at the end
+
+---++ Add GetLastError Function to Extracted Methods
+Run the following command to generate alternative methods with `CapturableState` support.
+```
+java AddGLE.java ../my_win_h.java OpenThreadToken OpenProcessToken GetTokenInformation LookupAccountSidA LookupAccountNameA DuplicateToken
+```
+Paste the output into `NTSystem.java`.

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+--target-package com.sun.security.auth.module.nt
+--library Kernel32
+--library Advapi32
+--output ../../../../../../..
+--include-function GetCurrentThread
+--include-function OpenThreadToken
+--include-function GetCurrentProcess
+--include-function OpenProcessToken
+--include-function GetTokenInformation
+--include-function LookupAccountSidA
+--include-function LookupAccountNameA
+--include-function CloseHandle
+--include-function IsValidSid
+--include-function GetSidSubAuthorityCount
+--include-function GetSidIdentifierAuthority
+--include-function GetSidSubAuthority
+--include-function DuplicateToken
+--include-function FormatMessageA
+--include-function FreeLibrary
+--include-function LoadLibraryExA
+--include-function LocalFree
+--include-typedef HANDLE
+--include-typedef PDWORD
+--include-struct _TOKEN_GROUPS
+--include-struct _SID_AND_ATTRIBUTES
+--include-constant TOKEN_DUPLICATE
+--include-constant TOKEN_READ
+--include-constant FORMAT_MESSAGE_ALLOCATE_BUFFER
+--include-constant FORMAT_MESSAGE_IGNORE_INSERTS
+--include-constant FORMAT_MESSAGE_FROM_SYSTEM
+--include-constant FORMAT_MESSAGE_FROM_HMODULE
+--include-constant LOAD_LIBRARY_AS_DATAFILE
+--include-constant SecurityImpersonation
+--include-constant TokenUser
+--include-constant TokenPrimaryGroup
+--include-constant TokenGroups
+--include-constant NERR_BASE
+--include-constant MAX_NERR
+
+my_win.h
